astronomy-engine vendored copy
==============================

- Package: astronomy-engine
- Version: 2.1.19
- Source: https://github.com/cosinekitty/astronomy
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/astronomy-engine
- License: MIT

This folder contains a pinned local copy of `astronomy.min.js` for runtime stability
and offline/internal-network operation.

License notice:
- The full upstream MIT license text is included in `LICENSE.txt`.

Update process:
1. Download a specific version from npm.
2. Replace `astronomy.min.js` in this folder.
3. Update version details in this file.
